creator: j@jedi.claranet.fr
text:
diff -ur ports/ftp/pure-ftpd.orig/Makefile ports/ftp/pure-ftpd/Makefile
--- ports/ftp/pure-ftpd.orig/Makefile	Wed May  9 11:33:54 2001
+++ ports/ftp/pure-ftpd/Makefile	Sat May 26 11:55:55 2001
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	pure-ftpd
-PORTVERSION=	0.98.1
+PORTVERSION=	0.98.2
 CATEGORIES=	ftp ipv6
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	pureftpd
diff -ur ports/ftp/pure-ftpd.orig/distinfo ports/ftp/pure-ftpd/distinfo
--- ports/ftp/pure-ftpd.orig/distinfo	Wed May  9 11:33:54 2001
+++ ports/ftp/pure-ftpd/distinfo	Sat May 26 11:56:05 2001
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (pure-ftpd-0.98.1.tar.gz) = 7117ca61cbf984c6bcfd351da19cc187
+MD5 (pure-ftpd-0.98.2.tar.gz) = 3d24ae42de19311d2b67f847c1d0af41

Fix: 

-
